advancements.survivalistessentials.crude: Not a really good weapon, but pretty good as a lawnmower
advancements.survivalistessentials.flint: Maybe hitting your round rock on a cube rock will work
advancements.survivalistessentials.stick: Pick up a rock from the ground and leaves might give some sticks
info.survivalistessentials.book.getting_: Gathering basic materials for crafting crude tools is essential for getting started. The following pages will cover what you MUST gather to survive.

Crude tools need Flint Shards!$(br)$(br)Simply knapp (right-click) Rocks you've gathered on a hard surface (any regular Stone/Cobblestone/Granite/etc. hard blocks) and with a bit of luck, you can split them in half to obtain shards.$(br)$(br)Once you have the $(l:survivalistessentials:tools/crude_tools)Crude Knife$(), you can make more shards in your crafting grid.

Sticks are essenial for creating your first Crude Tools. These are the most basic handles.$(br)$(br)Punching leaves and will drop sticks. The drop rate is not great but it will allow you to get sticks. Once you craft a knife, you can use it to increase the drop rate.

You may notice right away some small piles of rocks lying randomly on the ground throughout the world.$(br)$(br)Break and gather them quickly, they are a valuable AND necessary resource and needed for crafting tools.

Next you'll need to get some Plant Fiber.$(br)$(br)Plant Fiber is a new drop when breaking grass or most plants with the Crude Knife. Grass is probably the easiest way to get Plant Fiber.$(br)$(br)You'll need Plant Fiber to craft Plant String used in crafting the Crude Hatchet, Crude Saw and Bandages.
Plant String is essential for crafting the Crude Hatchet and Crude Saw. Gather enough Plant Fiber!
info.survivalistessentials.book.health.b: Better bandage, great for mid game.
Cheap bandage, great for early game.
Crude bandages are simple to make. Bandages are a little more work, but do a much better job of stopping the bleeding.
info.survivalistessentials.book.health.d: It's a little more difficult getting started. To help with the process, some basic bandages are available to help in the early game.
info.survivalistessentials.book.health.i: Cloth is an ingredient used for making Bandages.
There are several basic materials required for making bandages.
Essential tool for crafting plant paste.
Ointment is an ingredient used for making Bandages.
info.survivalistessentials.book.intro: Welcome to Survivalist Essentials!$(br)$(br)There are few very important things to remember when playing:$(br)$(li)A correct tool is required for harvesting.$(li)The only way to craft Wooden Planks and Sticks is with a saw.
info.survivalistessentials.book.subtitle: A Path to Survival
info.survivalistessentials.book.tools.cr: Crude Saw will allow you to craft planks! Upgrade the blade to increase plank output and durability.
Crude Saw Blade is the first part for the Crude Saw. Blades are replaceable on the Saw. The crude blades have only half the output of sharper blade materials.
Crude Hatchet is essential for gathering wood. You can now chop down trees!
Crude Knife is essential for gathering Plant Fiber. This MUST be the first tool crafted to progress.
In addition to more shards, you can also craft in any crafting grid:$(br)$(li)String: knife and wool$(br)$(li)Sticks: knife and saplings
Here is an example recipe with the Crude Saw that will allow you to craft planks!
The Saw Handle is a reusable part for crafting the Crude Saw. Once the blade breaks, just reuse the left over handle to create a new Saw.
Here is an example recipe with the Crude Saw that will allow you to craft sticks!
info.survivalistessentials.book.tools.de: Tools are essential for gathering materials and getting your first wood planks!$(br)$(br)Punching trees is no longer an option, so you'll need these most basic tools to be able to craft better tools, or more advanced items using the crafting table.
info.survivalistessentials.book.tools.im: While crude tools will get you started, you'll want to create more durable tools.
jei.survivalistessentials.description.fl: Flint shards can be obtained from striking a rock on any rocky surface. Interact with any stone-like block with a rock, and it might split into two flint shards.
jei.survivalistessentials.description.pl: Plant fibers are dropped when breaking grass or leaves with a knife. They are used to make plant string for tools and plant paste for bandage ointment.
jei.survivalistessentials.description.ro: Rocks are found lying on the ground. These can be used with the knife in a crafting table to get flint shards.
jei.survivalistessentials.description.st: Sticks are dropped from leaves. Using any knife doubles the chance of getting a stick.
message.survivalistessentials.tcon_compa: It is recommended to install Tinkers' Survival with Survivalist Essentials for better compatibility with Tinkers' Construct. It offers Tinkers' versions of the Saw and Knife!
survivalistessentials.configuration.armo:
List of individual armor items that will be disabled. If inverted, acts as a whitelist. Format modid:item Default: 
[""]

List of mods that armor will not be equipable for. If inverted, acts as a whitelist. Default: 
[""]
survivalistessentials.configuration.bloc:
List of mods that have blocks that are generally decorative in nature and 
require no tool for harvesting blocks. Default: 
["comforts"]
survivalistessentials.configuration.disa: Disables the modpack book from being available. It doesn't work outside of the official modpack.
survivalistessentials.configuration.enab: Enables the fail sound if using the wrong tool.
Health penalty feature. If after dying, player is rewarded with reduced health levels.
Hunger penalty feature. If after dying, player is rewarded with reduced hunger levels.
survivalistessentials.configuration.flin: Chance for a successful flint knapping. (1.0 = 100%, 0.4 = 40%, etc.)
survivalistessentials.configuration.gene: The amount of generic damage in half hearts a disabled tool, or bare hand should do. Default 0
survivalistessentials.configuration.heal: Heal rate for bandages. Crude bandages are 50% less effective. (1.0 = 100%, 0.4 = 40%, etc.)
Health value after death in half hearts.
survivalistessentials.configuration.hung: Hunger value after death in half shanks. (0 = Really? That's just cruel, 20 = No penalty.)
survivalistessentials.configuration.info: Informs user if Tinkers' Construct is installed and recommends installing Tinkers' Survival.
survivalistessentials.configuration.inve:
Inverts blacklist to be whitelist. This allows for immersion mods/modpacks to only 
allow tools or armor for specific mods. Default: false
survivalistessentials.configuration.item:
List of individual tools that will always work. Format tooltype-modid:item
Default: ["pickaxe-minecraft:diamond_pickaxe"]
Types: ["pickaxe", "pickadze", "bow", "crossbow", "axe", "hatchet", "hoe", "mattock", "kama", "shears", "shovel", "sword", "weapon", "hammer", "wirecutter", "wrench", "drill", "building", "revolver", "saw", "crook", "spell", "knife", "cad", "spear", "darkstar", "chisel"]
survivalistessentials.configuration.logm: Used to dump log info for Survivalist Essentials Modpack. Ignore.
survivalistessentials.configuration.mods:
List of mods that tools will become wet noodles. If inverted, acts as a whitelist. Default: 
[""]
survivalistessentials.configuration.satu: Saturation value after death. Range 0 to 20.
survivalistessentials.configuration.slow: Slowdown speed when using incorrect tool.
survivalistessentials.configuration.star: Health penalty in half hearts player starts with. Reduces total starting health by this amount.
List of tags when added to tools or armor will be disabled. If inverted, acts as a whitelist.
["c:blacklist_tools"]
tooltip.survivalistessentials.uselessArm: Axiom sizing: XXXL. Probably won't fit.
tooltip.survivalistessentials.uselessToo: Can only be used for crafting.
tooltip.survivalistessentials.uselessWea: This weapon hits like a wet noodle!
